overview.Name: Fastenal Company
overview.Description: Fastenal Company is an American company based in Winona, Minnesota. Fastenal's service model centers on approximately 3,200 in-market locations, each providing custom inventory, and a dedicated sales team to support local businesses. Fastenal offers companies supply chain solutions that help business reduce inventory touches, and supply chain waste.
overview.Address: 2001 THEURER BOULEVARD, WINONA, MN, UNITED STATES, 55987-1500
